title: LysoTracker and MitoTracker Staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6hisg","text":"Protocol for staining live cells with commercially available dyes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare fresh Astrocyte Media (AM ScienCell 1801) with 100nM of MitoTracker DeepRed (Thermo Scientific M22425)
Replace media on cells with media containing MitoTracker
During incubation, prepare fresh AM media with Hochst 33342 (Thermo Scientific 62249)
Replace the MitoTracker media with Hoechst 33342 media
Add fresh AM media and image cells
Prepare fresh Astrocyte Media (AM ScienCell 1801) with 100nM of LysoTracker DeepRed (Thermo Scientific L12492) and Hoechst 33342 (Thermo Scientific 62249)
Replace media on cells with media containing LysoTracker and Hoechst 33342
Add fresh AM media and image cells
creator: Camille Goldman
